name: codex-usage
description: Shows current Codex usage: context occupancy, remaining context, and 5-hour/weekly limit status from local token_count events.

interface.shortDescription: Show Codex context, usage, and limits
interface.longDescription: Reads local Codex rollout logs and reports the latest token_count event: context window usage, remaining context tokens, 5-hour limit usage, weekly limit usage, and reset times. Includes an MCP tool, CLI watcher, and a small always-on-top desktop widget that can sit near Codex or near the pet/avatar overlay.
defaultPrompt: Monitor my 5h and weekly Codex limits
How full is this Codex context?
